subcodes.first_line: O tender sapling of the garden of love for the All-Merciful Beauty! The trace of thy pen betokened the longing and fervor of thy heart and soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نونهال بوستان حب جمال رحمان اثر کلک که حکایت از شوق و هیجان دل و جان مینمود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
